policy_basis.preprint_policy: submitted papers may be posted on preprint servers
policy_basis.ai_use_policy: AI-generated content shall be disclosed in the acknowledgements section

decision.recommended_release_timing: tag a clean v0.1-submission artifact release before or at submission, after final author review and sensitive-content scan
decision.repository_positioning: research artifact repository for a minimal local evidence-profile implementation

exclude_or_redact: raw user prompts unless synthetic or redacted
raw user inputs unless synthetic or redacted
raw model outputs containing sensitive content
API keys, tokens, secrets, cookies, credentials
claims unsupported by local fixture evidence

license_decision.manuscript_license: follow IEEE submission and publication terms
license_decision.reason_for_defer: License choice affects downstream reuse and publication rights; author must finalize before public release.

pre_publication_checklist.minimum_action: Run sentinel/key scanning and manual review for prompts, user inputs, model outputs, and secrets.
Remove or rewrite claims such as certified, production-ready, full integration, or benchmark SOTA.
Ensure validator, resolver, packager, and evaluator run on local fixtures and regenerate reported tables.
State that artifacts are local fixtures and generated local packages, not external certification.
Keep repository README and manuscript disclosure consistent.
